title: history arc 02 lazygit investigation and harvest
summary: The development thread focuses on the investigation and harvest of lazygit code and notes, with the main topic being the transition from an investigation phase to a harvest of changes. Key decisions included the selection of cadence option B, which involved phase-not-PR, and the implementation of a structured approach to collecting and organizing the findings. The outcome was the completion of the investigation and the systematic harvesting of relevant code and notes.
